mapper.select:
/* SiteInfoMapper.selectSiteList - 현장목록 조회 */
SELECT s.* FROM site_info s WHERE s.del_yn = 'N' and parent_site_cd is null order by site_name

/* SiteInfoMapper.getManageSiteByUserId - 관리대상 부모 현장목록 조회 */ SELECT DISTINCT p.* FROM admin_user_site a JOIN site_info s ON a.site_cd = s.site_cd AND s.del_yn = 'N' JOIN site_info p ON p.site_cd = IFNULL(s.parent_site_cd, s.site_cd) AND p.del_yn = 'N' WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY p.site_name

/* IncidentMapper.selectNearbySections - 사용자 위치 기반으로 근처 고속도로 추천 */
SELECT t.* , si.site_name AS site_name , si.call_center_no , LEAST(t.d_start_m, t.d_end_m) AS near_m , CASE WHEN t.d_start_m <= t.d_end_m THEN 'START' ELSE 'END' END AS near_point FROM ( SELECT ss.section_id, ss.site_cd, ss.section_name, ss.start_lat, ss.start_lng, ss.end_lat, ss.end_lng, (6371000 * 2 * ASIN(SQRT( POW(SIN(RADIANS(ss.start_lat - #{lat}) / 2), 2) + COS(RADIANS(#{lat})) * COS(RADIANS(ss.start_lat)) * POW(SIN(RADIANS(ss.start_lng - #{lng}) / 2), 2) ))) AS d_start_m, (6371000 * 2 * ASIN(SQRT( POW(SIN(RADIANS(ss.end_lat - #{lat}) / 2), 2) + COS(RADIANS(#{lat})) * COS(RADIANS(ss.end_lat)) * POW(SIN(RADIANS(ss.end_lng - #{lng}) / 2), 2) ))) AS d_end_m FROM site_section ss WHERE ss.use_yn = 'Y' AND ss.min_lat <= (#{lat} + (#{radiusM} / 111320)) AND ss.max_lat >= (#{lat} - (#{radiusM} / 111320)) AND ss.min_lng <= (#{lng} + (#{radiusM} / (111320 * COS(RADIANS(#{lat}))))) AND ss.max_lng >= (#{lng} - (#{radiusM} / (111320 * COS(RADIANS(#{lat}))))) ) t JOIN site_info si ON si.site_cd = t.site_cd and si.del_yn = 'N' ORDER BY near_m ASC LIMIT #{limit}

/* IncidentMapper.selectAllSections - 전체 고속도로 조회 */
SELECT ss.* , si.site_name , si.call_center_no FROM site_section ss JOIN site_info si ON si.site_cd = ss.site_cd and si.del_yn = 'N' WHERE ss.use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY si.site_name, ss.section_name;
/* SiteInfoMapper.selectAllSiteCds - 전체 현장코드 조회 */ SELECT site_cd FROM site_info WHERE del_yn = 'N' ORDER BY site_name
